Package space.sunqian.fs.base.option

Interface Option<K,V>

Type Parameters:
K - the key type
V - the value type
@Immutable public interface Option<K,V>
This interface represents an option with a key and value. For example: 

 //declaration:
 public void start(Option<?, ?>... options){...}

 //usage:
 start(
     Option.of("server", null),
     Option.of("Xms", "1G"),
     Option.of("Xmx", "2G")
 );

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <K, V> @Nonnull Option<K,V>[]
    emptyOptions()
    Returns an empty Option array;
    boolean
    equals(@Nullable Object obj)
    Returns true if the specified object is equal to this option: both key and value are equal.
    int
    hashCode()
    Returns the hash code for this option.
    K
    key()
    Returns the key of this option.
    static <K, V> @Nonnull Option<K,V>
    of(K key)
    Returns an Option with the specified key and null value.
    static <K, V> @Nonnull Option<K,V>
    of(K key, V value)
    Returns an Option with the specified key and value.
    @Nonnull String
    toString()
    Returns a string to describe this option in format: [key: value].
    V
    value()
    Returns the value of this option.

      @Nonnull static <K, V> @Nonnull Option<K,V> of(@Nonnull K key, @Nullable V value)

      Returns:

      boolean equals(@Nullable @Nullable Object obj)
      Returns true if the specified object is equal to this option: both key and value are equal.

      equals in class Object

      Returns a string to describe this option in format: [key: value].

      toString in class Object

      assertEquals(Option.of("a", "1"), defaultOptions[0]);
